text: Netanyahu greeted with middle finger during live broadcast in Spain following his defamatory remarks against the country.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡在西班牙进行直播时，因其对该国发表的诽谤性言论而遭到中指问候。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is recovering from severe injuries, including reported facial disfigurement and leg wounds, sustained in an airstrike earlier in the war. He is said to remain involved in decision-making via remote communication, though his condition has not been officially confirmed and no public images or appearances have been released since the attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 路透社：伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊正在从严重的伤势中恢复，据报道包括面部毁容和腿部伤口，这些伤是在战争早期的空袭中造成的。据称他仍通过远程通讯参与决策，但其状况尚未得到官方证实，自袭击发生以来也没有发布过任何公开照片或露面。 @wfwitness

text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. intelligence suggests that China is getting ready to supply Iran with new air defense systems (MANPADS) in the coming weeks, according to three sources familiar with recent assessments, according to CNN. Two of the sources told CNN there are indications that Beijing is working to route the shipments through third countries to mask their true origin. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 据CNN援引三位熟悉近期评估的消息人士称，美国情报显示中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗提供新型防空系统（便携式防空导弹，MANPADS）。其中两位消息人士告诉CNN，有迹象表明北京正试图通过第三国转运这些货物，以掩盖其真实来源。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 Details of the Iranian negotiation team members — The meeting of the Iranian delegation, Mr. Ghalibaf with Mr. Shehbaz Sharif (PM of Pakistan), is scheduled for today, and after this meeting, the details of the Iran-US talks will be clarified. —…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran raises U.S. breaches with Pakistan’s PM Tasnim correspondent dispatched to Islamabad, Pakistan: — The Iranian delegation will raise the issue of breaches by the American side in today's noon meeting with Shehbaz Sharif, the Prime Minister of Pakistan. — The release of Iran's assets and a ceasefire in Lebanon were among the preconditions for starting negotiations. — The U.S. had informed Pakistan, as the mediator of the talks, that it agreed to these preconditions and some other conditions for starting negotiations. However, some of these have not yet been fulfilled. — The Iranian delegation intends to reach an assessment of the U.S. position and its adherence to commitments in today's sessions; after that, it will decide on negotiations with the U.S. — CNN’s report of multi-day talks in Islamabad is false; if held, they’ll likely last one day. — Iran is currently in the stage of evaluating the other side, and if a dialogue takes place, it will be from this afternoon, and for now, the plan is for one day.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 伊朗谈判小组成员详情——伊朗代表团卡利巴夫先生与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫先生的会晤定于今天举行，此次会晤后，伊美会谈的细节将变得明朗。——……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗向巴基斯坦总理提出美国违约问题。塔斯尼姆通讯社记者派驻巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡：——伊朗代表团将在今天中午与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的会晤中提出美方违约的问题。——释放伊朗资产和黎巴嫩停火是开始谈判的前提条件。——美国曾作为会谈调解人通知巴基斯坦，同意这些前提条件以及开始谈判的其他一些条件。然而，其中一些尚未实现。——伊朗代表团打算在今天的会议中评估美国的立场及其对承诺的遵守情况；之后，将决定是否与美国进行谈判。——CNN关于伊斯兰堡多日会谈的报道是不实的；如果举行，可能会持续一天。——伊朗目前处于评估对方的阶段，如果进行对话，将从今天下午开始，目前计划为期一天。

text: A Ukrainian FPV drone encounters a resting Russian soldier.
text_zh: 一架乌克兰FPV无人机遇到了一名正在休息的俄罗斯士兵。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 The US delegation has landed in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 JD Vance arrives in Islamabad for negotiations with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 美国代表团已降落在伊斯兰堡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 JD·万斯抵达伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行谈判。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance was greeted by Pakistani Field Marshal Asim Munir, Deputy Prime Minister Mohammad Ishaq Dar, and Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi upon arriving in Islamabad for talks with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统JD·万斯抵达伊斯兰堡进行伊美会谈时，受到了巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔、副总理穆罕默德·伊沙克·达尔和内政部长莫辛·纳克维的迎接。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Vance landed in Islamabad for Iran/US talks, welcomed by Pakistani officials. They seem friendly.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 万斯降落在伊斯兰堡进行伊美会谈，受到巴基斯坦官员的欢迎。他们看起来很友好。

text: 🇮🇷 Iran raises the issue of U.S. breaches of commitments with Pakistan’s Prime Minister Tasnim’s correspondent in Islamabad, Pakistan: ➡️ The Iranian delegation will raise the issue of the American side’s breaches of commitments in today’s noon meeting with Pakistan’s Prime Minister, Shehbaz Sharif. ➡️ The release of Iran’s assets and a ceasefire in Lebanon are among the preconditions for starting negotiations. ➡️ The United States had informed Pakistan, as the mediator of the talks, that it agrees to these preconditions and some other conditions for initiating negotiations. However, some of these have not yet been fulfilled. ➡️ In today’s meetings, the Iranian delegation intends to assess the U.S. position and its adherence to its commitments; after that, it will decide on whether to negotiate with the United States. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗向巴基斯坦总理提出美国违约问题。塔斯尼姆通讯社驻巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡记者：➡️ 伊朗代表团将在今天中午与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的会晤中提出美方违约的问题。➡️ 释放伊朗资产和黎巴嫩停火是开始谈判的前提条件。➡️ 美国曾作为会谈调解人通知巴基斯坦，同意这些前提条件以及开始谈判的其他一些条件。然而，其中一些尚未实现。➡️ 在今天的会议中，伊朗代表团打算评估美国的立场及其对承诺的遵守情况；之后，将决定是否与美国进行谈判。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: JD Vance has landed in Pakistan. This time, Asim Munir is wearing a suit while welcoming him; previously, he wore a military uniform when welcoming the Iranian delegation.
text_zh: JD·万斯已降落在巴基斯坦。这一次，阿西姆·穆尼尔穿着西装迎接他；此前，他在迎接伊朗代表团时穿着军装。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 Footage of Air Force 2, carrying U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance, arriving in Islamabad. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance in Islamabad. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 载有美国副总统JD·万斯的空军二号抵达伊斯兰堡的画面。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统JD·万斯在伊斯兰堡。 @wfwitness

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: I think there's a misinterpretation here about what happens ultimately with bombing, bombing, bombing. You can’t bomb away knowledge in the heads of scientists who now have mastered the nuclear cycle.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿约翰·克里：我认为这里对轰炸、轰炸、再轰炸最终会发生什么存在误解。你无法炸掉那些已经掌握核循环的科学家头脑中的知识。

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: When you go to war, you go to war hopefully with the support of your people. You have a defined threat. You have a clarity as to why you need to go to war. In this case, you have a war that is essentially fulfilling the long-held dream of Netanyahu to do as much damage to Iran as he is permitted to.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿约翰·克里：当你发动战争时，你希望是在人民的支持下发动战争。你有一个明确的威胁。你清楚为什么要发动战争。在这种情况下，这场战争本质上是在实现内塔尼亚胡长期以来的梦想，即在他被允许的范围内对伊朗造成尽可能大的破坏。

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The US delegation has landed in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国代表团已降落在伊斯兰堡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Senator Graham on Trump's rhetoric: If you’re talking to stone-cold homicidal maniacs, you need to speak the language they can understand.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员谈特朗普的言论：如果你是在和冷酷无情的杀人狂魔对话，你需要用他们能听懂的语言。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “We are loading ships with the best ammunition and the most advanced weapons ever made. If we fail to reach a deal with Iran, we will use them — and use them very effectively.” 📌 “We are dealing with new people, and we don’t know if they are telling the truth. They look us in the eye and say they will get rid of all nuclear weapons… then go to the press and say they prefer to continue uranium enrichment.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “我们正在装载有史以来制造的最精良弹药和最先进武器的船只。如果我们不能与伊朗达成协议，我们将使用它们——而且会非常有效地使用它们。” 📌 “我们正在与新人打交道，我们不知道他们是否在说真话。他们看着我们的眼睛说他们将销毁所有核武器……然后去媒体说他们更喜欢继续铀浓缩。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera reveals Iranian strike damage across American interests in Qatar Exclusive footage from "What Lies Hidden Is Greater" reveals: — Al Udeid air base & other military sites — Early warning radars in the north — Ras Laffan industrial city — the heart of Qatar’s gas sector — US-linked assets in residential areas, infrastructure
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 半岛电视台揭露伊朗对美国在卡塔尔利益的打击损害。独家镜头“隐藏的真相更巨大”揭示了：——乌代德空军基地及其他军事地点——北部的预警雷达——拉斯拉凡工业城——卡塔尔天然气工业的心脏——住宅区和基础设施中与美国有关的资产

text: Senator Graham on Iran: If they say no now, that tells you how crazy they are.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员谈伊朗：如果他们现在说不，那就说明他们有多疯狂。

text: Candace Owens to Trump: People will not fight behind, beside, or for someone who is fundamentally disloyal... MAGA is no longer commanded by you. You belong to the Epstein class.
text_zh: 坎迪斯·欧文斯对特朗普说：人们不会为一个根本不忠诚的人而战，也不会站在他身边或为他而战……MAGA不再由你指挥。你属于爱泼斯坦阶层。

text: Candace Owens to Trump: Charlie Kirk died free. You will most certainly die a slave.
text_zh: 坎迪斯·欧文斯对特朗普说：查理·柯克死得自由。你肯定会死得像个奴隶。

text: NOW: JD Vance arrives in Pakistan for talks with Iranian officials.
text_zh: 现在：JD·万斯抵达巴基斯坦，与伊朗官员进行会谈。

text: Alex Jones to Trump: You should be kissing my ass.
text_zh: 亚历克斯·琼斯对特朗普说：你应该亲吻我的屁股。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Tasnim: Iran's negotiating delegation is meeting Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif this afternoon in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗谈判代表团今天下午在伊斯兰堡会见巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: U.S. intelligence suggests China may soon send shoulder-fired air defense missiles (MANPADS) to Iran, possibly via third countries to hide their origin. China denies the claim, calling it false and urging de-escalation. Source: CNN
text_zh: 美国情报显示，中国可能很快会向伊朗运送肩扛式防空导弹（MANPADS），可能通过第三国以隐藏其来源。中国否认这一说法，称其为虚假信息，并敦促局势降温。来源：CNN

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Details of the Iranian negotiation team members — The meeting of the Iranian delegation, Mr. Ghalibaf with Mr. Shehbaz Sharif (PM of Pakistan), is scheduled for today, and after this meeting, the details of the Iran-US talks will be clarified. — According to Pakistani announcements, the American delegation also arrived in the country a few minutes ago. — The legal delegation is headed by Mr. Gharibabadi; the economic delegation by Mr. Hemmati, and the military committee by Mr. Ahmadian.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗谈判小组成员详情——伊朗代表团卡利巴夫先生与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫先生的会晤定于今天举行，此次会晤后，伊美会谈的细节将变得明朗。——根据巴基斯坦方面的公告，美国代表团也于几分钟前抵达该国。——法律代表团由加里巴巴迪先生领导；经济代表团由赫马蒂先生领导，军事委员会由艾哈迈迪安先生领导。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 The American delegation for talks with Iran has landed in Islamabad, Pakistan. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Footage of Air Force 2, carrying U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance, arriving in Islamabad. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 美国与伊朗会谈代表团已降落在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 载有美国副总统JD·万斯的空军二号抵达伊斯兰堡的画面。 @wfwitness

text: Daily summary on the key news of the past 48 hours! — The Handala hacker group has hacked into the phone of former IOF chief of staff Herzi Halevi. — Israeli military is making its move to capture the village of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon. — 700,000 barrels per day cut from Saudi oil production due to US/Israel imposed war on Iran. — DC Bilderberg Meeting kicking off April 9. Topics up for debate are out for off-the-record talks. — Lebanon–Israel talks in Washington next week — AFP. — Hezbollah chief praises bravery, steadfastness of resistance fighters in letter to nation. — U.S. Vice President JD Vance leaves for Islamabad , Pakistan, for talks with Iran. — Negotiation delegations in Pakistan. — "My companions on this flight #Minab168" . — Qatari radars heavily damaged after Iranian drone strikes.
text_zh: 过去48小时关键新闻每日摘要！——Handala黑客组织入侵了前以色列国防军参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机。——以色列军队正采取行动占领黎巴嫩南部的宾特朱拜勒村。——由于美以对伊朗发动的战争，沙特石油产量每天减少70万桶。——华盛顿彼尔德伯格会议于4月9日开幕。讨论议题为非公开会谈。——下周在华盛顿举行黎巴嫩-以色列会谈——法新社。——真主党领导人在致全国的信中赞扬了抵抗战士的勇敢和坚定。——美国副总统JD·万斯启程前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，与伊朗进行会谈。——谈判代表团在巴基斯坦。——“我这次航班的同伴 #Minab168”。——卡塔尔雷达在伊朗无人机袭击后严重受损。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S. forces are continuing to deploy to the West Asia for potential operations as American and Iranian teams prepare for negotiations in Pakistan Jet fighters and attack planes recently arrived in the Middle East, according to flight-tracking data and a U.S. official. Additionally, 1,500 to 2,000 troops from the Army's elite 82nd Airborne Division could arrive in the coming days, the U.S official said.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 随着美伊团队准备在巴基斯坦进行谈判，美军继续向西亚部署以进行潜在行动。据飞行跟踪数据和一名美国官员称，喷气式战斗机和攻击机最近抵达了中东。此外，该美国官员表示，陆军精锐第82空降师的1500至2000名士兵可能会在未来几天内抵达。

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The last seven hostages from the Kursk region who were held by Ukraine have been released. Russian Human Rights Ombudswoman Tatiana Moskalkova stated that they have left the temporary accommodation center and are heading towards the Ukrainian-Belarusian border. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 乌克兰扣押的最后七名库尔斯克地区人质已获释。俄罗斯人权专员塔季扬娜·莫斯卡尔科娃表示，他们已经离开临时安置中心，正前往乌克兰-白俄罗斯边境。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 An advisor to one of the Asian governments, which is a close ally of the United States, says they are negotiating with the Iranian ambassador and discussing whether their ships can quietly pay safe passage fees through the Strait of Hormuz using digital currency or Chinese yuan. — Wall Street Journal
text_zh: 🇮🇷 一位美国亲密盟友的亚洲政府顾问表示，他们正在与伊朗大使进行谈判，讨论他们的船只是否可以通过数字货币或人民币悄悄支付通过霍尔木兹海峡的安全通行费。——《华尔街日报》

text: 🇵🇰 ❌ 🇮🇱 Israeli journalists & media teams have been barred from entering Pakistan to cover the US-Iran talks in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇰 ❌ 🇮🇱 以色列记者和媒体团队被禁止进入巴基斯坦报道在伊斯兰堡举行的美伊会谈。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The American delegation for talks with Iran has landed in Islamabad, Pakistan. @wfwitness

text: Lebanese state sells south Lebanon again Axios reports that our government has proposed to the Israelis that they return to terrorising only the people of the south with endless attacks, drones surveilling their every move and assassinations. They’re setting the south up to be the sacrificial lamb for Lebanon.
text_zh: 黎巴嫩政府再次出卖黎巴嫩南部。Axios报道称，我们的政府向以色列人提议，让他们回到只恐吓南部人民的状态，进行无休止的袭击、无人机监视他们的一举一动以及暗杀。他们正在把南部变成黎巴嫩的替罪羊。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton Disappears Over Strait of Hormuz After Emergency On April 9, a U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton reconnaissance drone on patrol in the Strait of Hormuz turned towards Iran, emitted an automated “code 7700” alert -- a general signal used for any aircraft in distress -- and fell rapidly from 52,000 feet. When it dropped below 10,000 feet, the signal from its transponder was lost. There has not yet been official confirmation whether the drone crashed, was shot down by an Iranian missile, or whether it somehow recovered and made it back to base.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国海军MQ-4C“海神”无人机在紧急情况后在霍尔木兹海峡上空消失。4月9日，一架在霍尔木兹海峡巡逻的美国海军MQ-4C“海神”侦察无人机转向伊朗，发出了自动“7700代码”警报——这是任何遇险飞机使用的通用信号——并从52000英尺高空迅速坠落。当它降至10000英尺以下时，其应答机的信号丢失。目前尚未有官方确认该无人机是坠毁、被伊朗导弹击落，还是以某种方式恢复并返回基地。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Scenes from Islamabad’s Serena Hotel ahead of American-Iranian peace talks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美伊和平会谈前夕伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店的场景。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ A helpless, disarmed (by the state) Lebanese soldier cries as he is listening at the despair of a citizen who is telling them that the government does not respect them and cannot even pay their salaries, and that they should be standing on the side of their brothers in the south who are fighting for the homeland.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 一名无助的、被国家解除武装的黎巴嫩士兵在听到一名公民的绝望诉说时流下了眼泪，该公民告诉他们，政府不尊重他们，甚至无法支付他们的工资，他们应该站在南部为家园而战的兄弟们一边。

text: 🇺🇦 On the day of Odessa's liberation from the Nazis, city residents brought flowers to the monument to the Unknown Sailor. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 在敖德萨从纳粹手中解放的日子里，市民们向无名水手纪念碑献花。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical All released footage of US airstrikes on Iranian targets, sorted chronologically by the DOD-reported date. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042818268742697383/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国对伊朗目标进行空袭的所有已发布镜头，按国防部报告的日期按时间顺序排列。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042818268742697383/video/1 推文

text: 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 “You’ve proven to be nothing more than a milking cow.” Hamza Hassan, a Saudi opposition figure to bin Salman, commented on the recent meeting between the Saudi Minister of Finance and Pakistan’s Prime Minister before Iran/US talks begin, writing: “Damn you all! Money at a sensitive time! So, what does Saudi Arabia want from Shehbaz Sharif to do? For example, to use his position as a mediator to pressure the Iranian negotiator, and pass messages that serve the Saudi goal? Is this the Saudi Gulf presence in the negotiations?! Doesn't Trump represent you, as he clearly announced?! Do you want him to get tougher? To turn to your interests and not just Israel's interests? Your money doesn't make victory in mercenary wars. And your money doesn't bring victory to the negotiating table, because what's happening on the table is just a manifestation of the real power on the ground! Praise be to God, you prove that you're nothing but a cash cow looking for a new sponsor”
text_zh: 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 “事实证明，你们不过是一头奶牛。”沙特反对派人士哈姆扎·哈桑在评论沙特财政部长与巴基斯坦总理在伊美会谈开始前的近期会晤时写道：“该死！在敏感时刻谈钱！那么，沙特阿拉伯想让夏巴兹·谢里夫做什么？例如，利用他作为调解人的身份向伊朗谈判代表施压，并传递服务于沙特目标的讯息？这就是沙特海湾在谈判中的存在吗？！特朗普不是代表你们吗，正如他明确宣布的那样？！你们想让他更强硬吗？转向你们的利益，而不仅仅是以色列的利益？你们的钱在雇佣军战争中换不来胜利。你们的钱在谈判桌上也换不来胜利，因为桌上发生的一切只是地面真实力量的体现！感谢上帝，你们证明了你们不过是一头寻找新赞助人的摇钱树。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇶🇦🇮🇷 Moment of the Iranian strike on the Ras Laffan natural gas facility in Qatar, from earlier this evening. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇮🇷 Al Jazeera released previously unseen footage of the Iranian strike on the Ras Laffan gas facility earlier in the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇶🇦🇮🇷 今天早些时候伊朗对卡塔尔拉斯拉凡天然气设施打击的瞬间。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇮🇷 半岛电视台发布了冲突早期伊朗对拉斯拉凡天然气设施打击的此前未见镜头。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver air defense systems, including MANPADS, to Iran in the coming weeks. The shipments are reportedly being routed through third countries to obscure their origin, and could help Iran replenish capabilities during the current ceasefire. China denies the claims, saying it has not provided weapons to any party and is working to support de-escalation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 CNN：美国情报显示，中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付包括便携式防空导弹（MANPADS）在内的防空系统。据报道，这些货物正通过第三国转运以掩盖其来源，并可能帮助伊朗在当前停火期间补充能力。中国否认这些指控，称其未向任何一方提供武器，并致力于支持局势降温。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WSJ: U.S. President Trump told attendees of a recent meeting that he will pardon any that came 'withing 200 feet' of the oval office. The comment garned laughs, but seems to reflect Trump's sweeping use of Presidential pardons, issuing around 1,600 as of the time of writing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：美国总统特朗普在最近的一次会议上告诉与会者，他将赦免任何“靠近椭圆形办公室200英尺以内”的人。这一评论引起了笑声，但似乎反映了特朗普对总统赦免权的广泛使用，截至撰写本文时，他已发布了约1600项赦免。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇹🇷 Yediot Ahronot: ‘Less favorable outcome’: Israel sees U.S-Iran war slowing Arab states normalization. Security ties with UAE strengthened, but normalization hit as Arab states may tilt toward Iran and Turkey. Zionist official says outcome ‘less favorable’.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇹🇷 《新消息报》：“不太有利的结果”：以色列认为美伊战争减缓了阿拉伯国家的正常化进程。与阿联酋的安全关系得到加强，但正常化受到打击，因为阿拉伯国家可能会向伊朗和土耳其倾斜。犹太复国主义官员称结果“不太有利”。
